content.problemStatement:
Given a string containing uppercase English letters (possibly with duplicates), generate all unique permutations of the string (in lexicographical order).


Input Format

A single string SSS containing uppercase English letters


Output Format

Print all unique permutations of the string in a new line, space-separated.
constraints: S contains only uppercase English letters

sampleTestCases.output: ABC ACB BAC BCA CAB CBA

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Only three unique permutations are possible due to duplicate 'A'

sampleTestCases.output: ABGS ABSG AGBS AGSB ASBG ASGB BAGS BASG BGAS BGSA BSAG BSGA GABS GASB GBAS GBSA GSAB GSBA SABG SAGB SBAG SBGA SGAB SGBA
sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
All 24 unique permutations of ABSG in lexicographical order
